commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/codex-uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py -q -k 'opencode_agent or agent_harness_routing or library_yaml_declares_opencode'
commands.purpose: RED: verify new opencode agent routing tests fail before implementation.
commands.observed_result: 5 failed, 2 passed, 119 deselected. Failures showed opencode target_paths resolving to .claude/agents, missing default_opencode/global_opencode in library.yaml, global opencode base unresolved, and real install creating no .opencode artifact.

commands.command: git add tests/test_library_py_installers.py && git commit -m "test(CL-mr2q): red — opencode agent routing"
commands.purpose: Commit failing tests before production changes.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/codex-uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py -q -k 'opencode_agent or agent_harness_routing or library_yaml_declares_opencode'
commands.purpose: GREEN: verify opencode agent routing tests pass after implementation.

commands.observed_result: 113 passed and 13 failed due sandbox denial writing old real-install tests to /Users/malte/.local/share/library; not caused by the opencode change.

commands.purpose: Run the changed test file with writable XDG data cache for subprocess real installs.
Validate library.yaml after adding opencode agent default dirs.
commands.observed_result: PASS: library.yaml is valid against docs/schema/library.schema.json.

commands.command: git add library.yaml scripts/lib/installers/agent.py scripts/library.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-mr2q): green — route opencode agents"
commands.purpose: Commit production implementation after green tests.
